display_text: Shadow Shaman Aghanim's Scepter: Shackles — Enhances control and damage output by emitting Ether Shock from shackled units and allows casting on allies or Mass Serpent Wards. This upgrade counters enemy positioning by forcing them to spread out or take additional damage, while also providing utility for ally protection or ward defense.
search_text: Shadow Shaman Aghanim Scepter Shackles Ether Shock ally protection anti-positioning ward defense

display_text: Shadow Shaman Aghanim's Shard: Fowl Play — Increases survivability and utility by granting invulnerability frames and creating additional uncontrollable chickens. This upgrade counters burst damage and provides disruption potential by creating chaos with multiple chickens, while also allowing item usage during transformation.
search_text: Shadow Shaman Aghanim Shard Fowl Play invulnerability burst damage disruption chickens chaos
